markdownRemark.html:
This was one of my favorite courses at Imperial, taught by the excellent Professor Fay Dowker. Her clear teaching was a huge factor in helping me achieve a final grade of 96/100.

Here are the notes I created for the course, including a comprehensive summary and a targeted revision guide for the final exam.

  • Mathematical Methods for Physicists (PDF)
  • Exam Review Guide (PDF)

You can find my complete collection of notes from Imperial on GitHub. If you find them useful, please consider giving the repository a star!

View on GitHub
